title: viola minima
intro: Viola minima, also known as the least violet or small violet, is a low-growing, annual plant species in the violet family (Violaceae). The plant's medicinal properties include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral agent, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Viola minima include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, thanks to its calming effects. Viola minima can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its medicinal properties, and is often used in herbal remedies for its soothing and anti-inflammatory effects.
